SEVERE WEATHER WASCO COUNTY WASCO COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE SEVERE WEATHER SHELTER LOCATOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on warming centers during a severe weather event. May offer additional warming resources. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Warming centers operate during the winter months and during severe weather advisories. Locations open either throughout the winter season or when temperature thresholds are met. Email Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
